benchmarks.licence_note: Use as an evaluation benchmark for verifier quality, not as a live authority for arbitrary user claims.
benchmarks.name: RAGTruth
benchmarks.use_case: Benchmark hallucination detection against human-annotated RAG responses.

benchmarks.licence_note: Use benchmark records according to the dataset licence and preserve dataset version metadata.
benchmarks.name: Vectara RAGBench
benchmarks.use_case: Stress-test retrieval faithfulness over complex document, table and generated-answer examples.

engines.licence_note: Optional advisory dependency. LLM-as-judge outputs must be frozen and labelled non-deterministic before kernel use.

metrics.label: Hallucination
metrics.signal: Checks whether generated text conflicts with provided context.

metrics.label: G-Eval
metrics.signal: LLM-as-judge rubric scoring for custom truth criteria.

engines.name: DeepEval
engines.role: Advisory hallucination and rubric scoring after standards evidence is retrieved.

engines.licence_note: Optional advisory dependency for RAG quality metrics. Scores are stored as evaluator artefacts, not final truth.

metrics.label: Faithfulness
metrics.signal: Measures whether answer claims are supported by retrieved contexts.

metrics.label: Answer relevancy
metrics.signal: Measures alignment between the answer and the original user question.

engines.name: Ragas
engines.role: Advisory RAG quality scoring for standards, uploads and retrieved evidence contexts.

engines.licence_note: Use as an optional evaluator for nugget and citation-faithfulness style checks.

metrics.label: AutoNuggetizer
metrics.signal: Checks information nuggets in an answer without requiring golden answers.

metrics.label: Citation faithfulness
metrics.signal: Checks whether cited passages support generated claims.

engines.name: Open RAG Eval
engines.role: Advisory citation and nugget-level context validation.
